name: python3-globre
title: python3-globre
description:
Glob-Like Pattern Matching (Python 3)
This package contains a module to convert a glob-matching pattern to a regular
expression, using Apache Cocoon style rules (with some extensions).
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-globre because Glob-Like Pattern Matching (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-globre as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-globre with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-globre --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
